wake.title: Monday Momentum 🌅
wake.body: New week. New goals. Time to hit the gym!

go.title: Ignite the Catalyst 🔥
go.body: Push day calls. Crush those chest and shoulder goals.

complete.title: Monday Crushed 🏆
complete.body: Started the week strong. Rest and recover.

wake.title: Tuesday Tenacity 🌅
wake.body: Don't lose the momentum. Get up and hit the weights.

go.title: Pull Power 🔥
go.body: Back and biceps today. Let's build that foundation.

complete.title: Tuesday Conquered 🏆
complete.body: Another day down. Great work on the pull session!

wake.title: Wednesday Willpower 🌅
wake.body: Midweek hump. Legs day. You've got this.

go.title: Leg Day Protocol 🔥
go.body: Time to build the base. Squats are waiting.

complete.title: Legs Demolished 🏆
complete.body: You survived leg day. Time to refuel and recover!

wake.title: Thursday Thrive 🌅
wake.body: Active recovery day. Get up and get moving.

go.title: Stay Active 🔥
go.body: Abs and cardio today. Keep the engine running smoothly.

complete.title: Recovery Completed 🏆
complete.body: Good job staying active on your recovery day.

wake.title: Friday Focus 🌅
wake.body: The weekend is near, but the grind doesn't stop.

go.title: Upper Body Pump 🔥
go.body: Chest, back, and arms. Let's finish the week strong.

complete.title: Friday Finished 🏆
complete.body: Excellent effort. Enjoy your evening—you earned it.

wake.title: Saturday Strength 🌅
wake.body: Weekend warrior mode. Get up and attack the day.

go.title: Weekend Grind 🔥
go.body: Shoulders and legs. One last push before Sunday rest.

complete.title: Week Complete 🏆
complete.body: Amazing job finishing the week's workouts. Enjoy your Sunday off!

wake.title: Sunday Reset 🌅
wake.body: Rest day. Take it easy and recover for tomorrow.

go.title: Active Rest 🔥
go.body: Keep it light today. Abs and cardio if you're up for it.

complete.title: Sunday Done 🏆
complete.body: Ready for a new week. Great job staying on track.
